name: datacenter-mcp-server
description: Mission-critical data center engineering MCP server. 8 professional calculation tools for cooling loads, power redundancy, GPU thermal optimization, UPS/battery sizing, tier classification, commissioning workflows, rack density analysis, and reference lookup.
author: NextGen Mission Critical

tools.name: dc_calculate_cooling_load
tools.description: Calculate ASHRAE-compliant cooling requirements including tonnage, airflow, and chilled water capacity

tools.name: dc_analyze_power_redundancy
tools.description: Analyze electrical distribution with N/N+1/2N/2N+1 redundancy configurations

tools.name: dc_assess_tier_classification
tools.description: Evaluate facility design against Uptime Institute Tier I-IV standards

tools.name: dc_generate_commissioning_plan
tools.description: Generate L1-L5 commissioning workflows per ASHRAE Guideline 0

tools.name: dc_analyze_rack_density
tools.description: Analyze rack power density from 5-100+ kW with cooling strategy selection

tools.name: dc_gpu_cooling_optimizer
tools.description: Optimize cooling for GPU/AI workloads (H100, A100, H200, B200, GB200)

tools.name: dc_ups_battery_sizing
tools.description: Size UPS and battery systems with VRLA vs lithium-ion TCO comparison

tools.name: dc_reference_lookup
tools.description: Query ASHRAE standards, Uptime Institute requirements, and industry best practices
